Fix Test bootstrap environment value

Updated the Test stage environment value in terraform-bootstrap-pipeline.yaml from ICECowboysTestD365 to test so the shared backend bootstrap template can parse the pipeline correctly.

This is required before rerunning the backend/storage pipeline from Develop through the proper Test → UAT flow.

--------------------

I cancelled the run and created a small follow-up PR to fix the existing Test environment value in the bootstrap pipeline so it can parse correctly from Develop.

After this is merged, I’ll rerun the backend/storage pipeline through the proper Test → UAT flow.
